docs.title: Billing incident review 2026-05-01
docs.content:
Billing Incident Review 2026-05-01

Participants: alice, eve, frank

alice: We had a spike of stripe webhook failures starting around 14:00 UTC. Sentry caught it as SENTRY-1012 - the billing-service was returning 422 on every webhook.
eve: I traced it to a Stripe API version mismatch. Our webhook handler expected the old event shape but Stripe rolled their API.
frank: SENTRY-1012 shows 3,200 occurrences in 2 hours. I've escalated it to P1.
alice: The billing-service needs an emergency patch. Let's coordinate with the payments team.

docs.title: SENTRY-1012: billing-service 422 on Stripe webhook
docs.content:
Error group SENTRY-1012
Project: prbe-billing
Message: Unprocessable Entity: unexpected field 'payment_method_details' in stripe event
Occurrences: 3,847 in last 3h
First seen: 2026-05-01 14:03:00 UTC
Status: Unresolved
Assigned to: alice

docs.title: BILL-88: Stripe API version upgrade
docs.content:
Issue BILL-88: Upgrade Stripe API version to 2024-04-10
Status: Backlog
Description: Our webhook handlers need updating for the new Stripe event schema introduced in API version 2024-04-10.

expected_edges.note: Granola meeting explicitly reviews the SENTRY-1012 billing-service error group by name and discusses its impact
Meeting is loosely connected to BILL-88 (the Stripe API upgrade backlog item that caused the incident) without explicitly discussing its content
